hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then dir=$(echo "$f" | grep -oP '(fastmcp-toolkit|fastapi-toolkit)' | head -1); if [ -n "$dir" ]; then cd "$dir" && uv run ruff check src/ tests/; fi; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then dir=$(echo "$f" | grep -oP '(fastmcp-toolkit|fastapi-toolkit)' | head -1); if [ -n "$dir" ]; then cd "$dir" && uv run ruff format --check src/ tests/; fi; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then dir=$(echo "$f" | grep -oP '(fastmcp-toolkit|fastapi-toolkit)' | head -1); if [ -n "$dir" ]; then cd "$dir" && uv run pytest; fi; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
